titleStmt.title: SII 8.286: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 286. (A.R. No. 16-A of 1903). ON THE SIDE OF THE SOUTH VERANDAH OF THE FIRST PRAKARA IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . viruppaṇaUṭaiyaṟkuc cellāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 2 10ṉmel bahudhānnya varuṣaM tai 2 10 4 śrīvasiṣṭha kuṭiĀṉa vidyāraṇyapurattu Uṭaiyār Ūruṭait tiruttāntoṉṟīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilp pūcaikkāṇi nāḷ muppatu vaṭṭattil Ācūcattukku pūjikkaikku nikkiṉa nāḷ Eḻarai nikki nāḷ Irupattiraṇṭaraikku ĀtrayaN candraśekharaN Ūruṭaiyaperumāḷnampiyār Uṭaṉe Ikkotrattu kuṟṟampoṟuttaṉāyaṉār Āṉa gaṅgādharapaṇḍitarum Ivar tamaiyaṉār periyamutaliyār makaṉār tirumeniAḻakiyaperumāḷum Ivar tampi Aḻakiyatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārum Ivar tampi Iḷaiyanāyaṉārum Ivvaṉaivarum
Eṅkaḷukkum Itile patiṉoṉṟekāl nāḷ Uṇṭeṉṟu Inta Ūruṭaipperu mā ḷakampaṭiyāruṭaṉe neṭuṉāḷāka vaḻakkuc collukaiyil Intak kuṟṟampoṟuttanāyaṉār Āṉa gaṅgādharapaṇḍitarum tirumeniaḻakiyaperumāḷum tampimārum Inta Ūruṭaipperumāḷnampiyāṟku satyaM paṇṇikkuṭuttup peṟa veṇṭukaiyil satyaM paṇṇāmal Eṅkaḷilp porunta vakaiyaṟuttukkoṇṭapaṭi Inta gaṅgādharapaṇḍitaṟkum tirumeniAḻakiyaperumāḷum tampimāṟkum nāḷ Aiñcaraiye Araikkālum Iṟṟaināḷ Inta Ūruṭaipperumāḷnampiyār pakkal tirumeni Aḻikiyaperumāḷum tampimārum viracampaṉ
kuḷikai paṇam Irupattiraṇṭukku vilaikoṇṭa nāḷ Oṉṟe mukkāle Araikkālum Āka nāḷ Eḻarai nikki Ūruṭaipperumāḷnampiyār nāḷp patiṉaiñcu Āka Ippaṭikku Eṅkaḷil nāṅkaḷ porunti vakaiyaṟuttukkoṇṭom Ivvaṉaivarom . Ippaṭikku Ivai candraśekharaN Ūruṭaipperumāḷ nampiya Aār Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṟṟampoṟutta nāyiṉār gaṅgādharapaṇḍitar Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumeṉi Aḻakiyaperumāḷ Eḻuttu . Ip paṭikku Ivai Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai Iḷaiyanāyaṉār Eḻuttu . śivamastu .
Digital edition of SII 8.286 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
